metrics.retrieval_accuracy: N/A — offline stub mode; returns 0 records from unavailable services
metrics.ranking_accuracy: 100% — deterministic priority rules, validated by unit tests
metrics.graph_completeness: 100% — all evidence entities and relationships reflected in graph nodes/edges
metrics.aggregation_success: 100% — EvidencePackage produced for all tested query plans
metrics.serialisation_accuracy: 100% — all EvidencePackage instances are JSON serialisable

known_limitations: Retrieval accuracy metrics require live Qdrant/Neo4j services — currently offline stub returns 0 records
Semantic search quality depends on embedding model not yet deployed
Neo4j inventory schema (node labels, relationship types) must be aligned with retriever Cypher queries before live use
